title: urginavia altissima
intro: Urginavia altissima, also known as Mountain Pennyroyal, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. This plant contains compounds with carminative and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and skin infections. The medicinal properties of Urginavia altissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it beneficial for various health issues such as arthritis, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Urginavia altissima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as to soothe respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma.
